attributes.readMe:
# MultiImageSourceEditor

## Summary
The edit UI for the Multi Image Source field, assigned as its edit format. It renders a hero preview of the highlighted image, a one-row scrollable thumbnail strip with per-image remove, a full-width Link Image bar (the linksTo editor for the field's `newImage` add slot — picks are adopted into `images` in a microtask and the slot is cleared), and a compact paste-URL row. Empty state is a two-panel link-or-URL invitation that stacks in narrow hosts. All mutating handlers no-op when the contained field value is undefined.

## Import
```js
import MultiImageSourceEditor from '../components/multi-image-source-editor';
```

## Template Usage
Not invoked directly — assigned as the edit format in `multi-image-source.gts`:
```js
class EditTemplate extends Component<typeof MultiImageSourceField> {
  <template>
    <MultiImageSourceEditor @model={{@model}} @fileField={{@fields.newImage}} />
  </template>
}
```
attributes.cardDescription: Gallery editor for an ordered list of images — hero preview, scrollable thumbnail strip with per-image remove, Link Image bar, and a paste-URL row.
